title: tragacantha tenera
intro: Tragacantha tenera, also known as Astragalus tener, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as boosting the immune system, reducing stress, and improving cardiovascular health. Tragacantha tenera can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder for use in herbal remedies.
